curation_notes: The patch (PR #690) replaces the satori/go.uuid dependency with google/uuid across 4 non-test source files. The only UUID generation call is uuid.NewV1() in replication/binlogsyncer.go registerSlave(), which is the primary vulnerable location. The other file changes (canal/sync.go, mysql/mysql_gtid.go, replication/event.go) are import swaps and API adjustments for the new library. Marked as noisy because 4 non-test source files were modified, though all changes are tightly related to the dependency replacement.
